cards.name: Holon Fossil
cards.text: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for an Omanyte, Kabuto, Aerodactyl, Aerodactyl ex, Lileep, or Anorith and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. If tails, put an Omanyte, Kabuto, Aerodactyl, Aerodactyl ex, Lileep, or Anorith from your hand onto your Bench. Treat the new Benched Pokémon as a Basic Pokémon.

tests.name: holon_fossil_heads_searches_deck
tests.description: Test that heads result searches deck for fossil Pokemon

tests.name: holon_fossil_tails_plays_from_hand
tests.description: Test that tails result plays fossil Pokemon from hand
